subcodes.first_line: Praised be Thou O Lord My God. This is My sister who hath believed in the Manifestations of Thy unity appearing in the garments of Thy eternity
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذه اختی التی آمنت بمظاهر احدیتک فی قمایص ازلیتک و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @presence of; reunion with God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
